languages.text: {n}Рассеяно кивнув, Эоганн продолжает бормотать:{/n} "Просто измышлениями ошибку не постичь. Опыт придется повторить, провести более тщательный отбор объектов... Да, да, это единственный путь. Но сначала нужно тщательно пересмотреть критерии".

{n}Nodding absent-mindedly, Eogunn continues to mutter,{/n} "One cannot comprehend an error through mere speculation. The experiment will have to be repeated, with more rigorous selection of subjects... Yes, yes, that is the only way. But first, the criteria must be thoroughly reworked."
languages.original_text: {n}Рассеяно кивнув, Эоганн продолжает бормотать:{/n} "Просто измышлениями ошибку не постичь. Опыт придется повторить, провести более тщательный отбор объектов... Да, да, это единственный путь. Но сначала нужно тщательно пересмотреть критерии".

traits.locale_text: {n}Nodding absent-mindedly, Eogunn continues to mutter,{/n} "One cannot comprehend an error through mere speculation. The experiment will have to be repeated, with more rigorous selection of subjects... Yes, yes, that is the only way. But first, the criteria must be thoroughly reworked."

{n}Nodding absent-mindedly, Eogunn continues to mutter,{/n} "One cannot comprehend an error through mere speculation. The experiment will have to be repeated, with more rigorous selection of subjects... Yes, yes, that is the only way. But first, the criteria must be thoroughly reworked."

{n}Nodding absent-mindedly, Eogunn continues to mutter,{/n} "One cannot comprehend an error through mere speculation. The experiment will have to be repeated, with more rigorous selection of subjects... Yes, yes, that is the only way. But first, the criteria must be thoroughly reworked."

languages.text: {n}ぼんやりと頷きながら、エオガンは呟き続ける。{/n}「単なる推測では、誤りを理解することはできない。実験は、より厳格な被験者の選定のもとで繰り返さなければならない…そうだ、そうだ、それが唯一の道だ。だが、まずは基準を徹底的に見直さなければならない」
languages.original_text: {n}Nodding absent-mindedly, Eogunn continues to mutter,{/n} "One cannot comprehend an error through mere speculation. The experiment will have to be repeated, with more rigorous selection of subjects... Yes, yes, that is the only way. But first, the criteria must be thoroughly reworked."

traits.locale_text: ぼんやりと頷きながら、エオグンは呟き続ける。「単なる推測では、誤りを理解することはできない。実験は、より厳格な被験者の選定のもとで繰り返さなければならない…そうだ、そうだ、それが唯一の道だ。だが、まずは基準を徹底的に見直さなければならない。」

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡心不在焉地点了点头，继续喃喃自语：{/n}“仅凭臆测无法完全认识错误。必须重复实验，用更严格的标准筛选实验体……是的，是的，这是唯一的办法。但首先，必须彻底修改相关标准。”
languages.original_text: {n}Nodding absent-mindedly, Eogunn continues to mutter,{/n} "One cannot comprehend an error through mere speculation. The experiment will have to be repeated, with more rigorous selection of subjects... Yes, yes, that is the only way. But first, the criteria must be thoroughly reworked."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡心不在焉地点了点头，继续喃喃自语：{/n}“仅凭臆测无法完全认识错误。必须重复实验，用更严格的标准筛选实验体……是的，是的，这是唯一的办法。但首先，必须彻底修改相关标准。”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn hoche la tête distraitement et continue à marmonner :{/n} « On ne peut pas se contenter de simples spéculations pour comprendre une erreur. Il faut réitérer l'expérience, en sélectionnant les sujets avec une plus grande rigueur... Oui, oui, c'est la seule solution. Mais avant tout, les critères doivent être complètement révisés. »
languages.original_text: {n}Nodding absent-mindedly, Eogunn continues to mutter,{/n} "One cannot comprehend an error through mere speculation. The experiment will have to be repeated, with more rigorous selection of subjects... Yes, yes, that is the only way. But first, the criteria must be thoroughly reworked."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn hoche la tête distraitement et continue à marmonner :{/n} « On ne peut pas se contenter de simples spéculations pour comprendre une erreur. Il faut réitérer l'expérience, en sélectionnant les sujets avec une plus grande rigueur... Oui, oui, c'est la seule solution. Mais avant tout, les critères doivent être complètement révisés. »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn asiente sin prestar mucha atención y continúa murmurando:{/n} «Es imposible comprender un error mediante mera especulación. He de repetir el experimento, con una selección más rigurosa de los sujetos... Sí, sí, esa es la única respuesta. Pero antes, los criterios deben cambiar por completo».
languages.original_text: {n}Nodding absent-mindedly, Eogunn continues to mutter,{/n} "One cannot comprehend an error through mere speculation. The experiment will have to be repeated, with more rigorous selection of subjects... Yes, yes, that is the only way. But first, the criteria must be thoroughly reworked."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn asiente sin prestar mucha atención y continúa murmurando:{/n} «Es imposible comprender un error mediante mera especulación. He de repetir el experimento, con una selección más rigurosa de los sujetos... Sí, sí, esa es la única respuesta. Pero antes, los criterios deben cambiar por completo».

languages.text: {n}Dalgın dalgın başını sallayan Eogunn, mırıldanmaya devam ediyor.{/n} "İnsan bir hatayı sadece varsayımla kavrayamaz. Deneyin daha titiz bir denek seçimiyle tekrarlanması gerekecek... Evet, tek yolu bu. Fakat önce kriterler, kapsamlı bir şekilde yeniden incelenmeli."
languages.original_text: {n}Nodding absent-mindedly, Eogunn continues to mutter,{/n} "One cannot comprehend an error through mere speculation. The experiment will have to be repeated, with more rigorous selection of subjects... Yes, yes, that is the only way. But first, the criteria must be thoroughly reworked."

traits.locale_text: {n}Dalgın dalgın başını sallayan Eogunn, mırıldanmaya devam ediyor.{/n} "İnsan bir hatayı sadece varsayımla kavrayamaz. Deneyin daha titiz bir denek seçimiyle tekrarlanması gerekecek... Evet, tek yolu bu. Fakat önce kriterler, kapsamlı bir şekilde yeniden incelenmeli."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn nickt gedankenverloren und murmelt weiter: {/n} "Man kann einen Fehler nicht durch bloße Spekulation erfassen. Das Experiment muss mit einer gründlicheren Auswahl von Subjekten wiederholt werden ... Ja, ja, das ist der einzige Weg. Aber zuerst müssen die Kriterien gründlich überarbeitet werden."
languages.original_text: {n}Nodding absent-mindedly, Eogunn continues to mutter,{/n} "One cannot comprehend an error through mere speculation. The experiment will have to be repeated, with more rigorous selection of subjects... Yes, yes, that is the only way. But first, the criteria must be thoroughly reworked."

Das Experiment muss mit einer gründlicheren Auswahl von Subjekten wiederholt werden ... Ja, ja, das ist der einzige Weg. Aber zuerst müssen die Kriterien gründlich überarbeitet werden."
